title: pinus bungeana subsp. squamata
intro: Pinus bungeana subsp. squamata, also known as the Chinese white pine, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant and antiseptic. The health benefits of Pinus bungeana subsp. squamata include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the needles and bark of the Chinese white pine are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
